spans.quote: A rectangle with **selectively enlarged opposite corner radii**; the other two corners keep a slight radius. Used to house callout text and photography.
Approved radius pairs (print): **1.25" & 0.0625"** (large containers/photos), **0.5" & 0.0625"** (banners), **0.4375" & 0.0625"** (small callout boxes).
